task: I'm getting a ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'requests' when running my Python script. How do I fix this? I'm using Python 3.11 on Ubuntu.

tools.description: Search official Python documentation and common error solutions. Returns matching documentation entries.

results.title: ModuleNotFoundError
results.snippet: This error occurs when Python cannot locate a module. For 'requests', install it via pip: pip install requests. Ensure you are using the correct Python environment (e.g., virtual environment or system Python).
